    Class
    Description
    ChunksAverage
    Datapoint for looking up Average CHUNKS usage within the timeframe.
    ChunksPerPlayer
    Datapoint for looking up Average Chunks per player within the timeframe.
    CPUAverage
    Datapoint for looking up Average CPU usage within the timeframe.
    CPUImpactPerPlayer
    Datapoint for looking up Average CPU impact per player within the timeframe.
    DiskMax
    Datapoint for looking up Maximum Free Disk within the timeframe.
    DiskMin
    Datapoint for looking up Minimum Free Disk within the timeframe.
    Downtime
    Downtime datapoint.
    EntitiesAverage
    Datapoint for looking up Average ENTITIES usage within the timeframe.
    EntitiesPerChunk
    Datapoint for looking up Average Entities per Chunk within the timeframe.
    MSPTAverage
    Datapoint for looking up Average MSPT within the timeframe.
    MSPTAverageWithLowTPS
    Datapoint for looking up Average MSPT within the timeframe when TPS is low.
    MSPTImpactPerChunk
    Datapoint for looking up Average MSPT impact per Chunk within the timeframe.
    MSPTImpactPerPlayer
    Datapoint for looking up Average MSPT impact per player within the timeframe.
    MSPTJitterAverage
    Datapoint for looking up Average MSPT Jitter within the timeframe.
    MSPTJitterMax
    Datapoint for looking up Max MSPT Jitter within the timeframe.
    MSPTMax95th
    Datapoint for looking up Average MSPT within the timeframe.
    MSPTMax95thWithLowTPS
    Datapoint for looking up Average MSPT within the timeframe when TPS is low.
    PlayersOnlineAverage
    Datapoint for looking up Average Players Online within the timeframe.
    PlayersOnlineCurrent
    Datapoint for looking up current Players online count.
    PlayersOnlinePeak
    Datapoint for looking up maximum Player online count within the timeframe.
    RAMAverage
    Datapoint for looking up Average RAM usage within the timeframe.
    ServerOccupied
     
    TPSAverage
    Datapoint for looking up Average TPS within the timeframe.
    TPSLowSpikes
    Datapoint for Low TPS spikes.
    Uptime
    Uptime datapoint.
    UptimeCurrent
    Datapoint for looking up current uptime of the servers.
